---
title: "Pubblicazioni"
lang: it
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
#| output: asis
# Auto-sync the Italian publications list from the English publications.qmd
# (which is periodically updated by an automated agent). We translate only
# the page chrome and section headings; bibliographic entries are kept
# verbatim. (execute-dir is "project", so this reads the root file.)
lines <- readLines("publications.qmd", warn = FALSE)
yend  <- which(lines == "---")[2]
body  <- paste(lines[(yend + 1):length(lines)], collapse = "\n")

body <- gsub(
  "This page presents a selection of my most relevant publications, organized by research area.",
  "Questa pagina presenta una selezione delle mie pubblicazioni più rilevanti, organizzate per area di ricerca.",
  body, fixed = TRUE)
body <- gsub("For a complete list, please visit my",
             "Per l'elenco completo, visita il mio", body, fixed = TRUE)
body <- gsub("Google Scholar profile", "profilo Google Scholar", body, fixed = TRUE)

body <- gsub("## Monographs", "## Monografie", body, fixed = TRUE)
body <- gsub("## Journal Articles", "## Articoli su rivista", body, fixed = TRUE)
body <- gsub("### Bibliometrics, Science Mapping and Text Analysis",
             "### Bibliometria, Science Mapping e Analisi Testuale", body, fixed = TRUE)
body <- gsub("### Statistics and Machine Learning",
             "### Statistica e Machine Learning", body, fixed = TRUE)
body <- gsub("### Tourism, Management, Transportation, and Social Sciences",
             "### Turismo, Management, Trasporti e Scienze Sociali", body, fixed = TRUE)

cat(body)
```
